title: Redundant len assertion in default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https
description:
wallet/src/client.rs has two tests for DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS length:
- default_mainnet_endpoints_len_at_least_three: asserts >= 3
- default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https: asserts >= 2

The >= 2 assertion in the second test is completely subsumed by the >= 3 assertion in the first. If the first test passes, the second's length check is always satisfied and contributes nothing. The second test also asserts https scheme which is independent and useful, but the length assertion is dead weight. Remove the >= 2 assertion from default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https to eliminate the redundancy and make each test's intent clear.
